hero.subtitle: Specializing in React, Next.js & modern web architecture. Turning complex business problems into elegant digital solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.para1: I’m a Front-End Developer who builds production-ready web platforms that drive real business outcomes. At Nabdh Alibtikar (نبض الابتكار), I helped build and launch the company website and core business-facing systems, taking ownership across architecture, implementation, and delivery. I focus on interfaces that are fast, scalable, and genuinely useful, with clean structure that teams can maintain over time.
about.para2: My day-to-day stack is React, Next.js, JavaScript, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion, and I’m actively expanding into TypeScript and advanced performance optimization. I’ve shipped e-commerce, media, and finance products with API integrations, authentication, protected routes, and reusable component systems. I’m at my best in teams that value product thinking, code quality, and measurable impact.

featured.title: Featured Projects
featured.subtitle: Production systems solving real business problems.

nabdh-alibtikar.description: Designed and built the full company website, implemented CMS and CRM using Supabase and Next.js — responsible for performance, maintenance, and the full tech stack.
nabdh-alibtikar.problem: The company needed a full web presence — website, content management, and customer relationship tools — with no backend developer on the team.
nabdh-alibtikar.solution: Architected and built the entire stack solo: company website, a custom CMS for content updates, and a CRM system — all powered by Supabase (database, auth, storage) with Next.js and React on the frontend.
nabdh-alibtikar.result: A fully operational platform the client's team manages independently, with no ongoing developer dependency.

kobonvip.description: Coupon aggregation platform with role-based admin dashboard, merchant analytics, and real-time coupon validation built with React, Redux Toolkit, and Supabase.
kobonvip.problem: A client needed a coupon aggregation platform where users browse deals and the business can manage coupons, stores, and track engagement — all without a backend team.
kobonvip.solution: Built a public-facing coupon site alongside a full admin dashboard with CRUD operations, store + logo management, and a click-tracking system to surface the most-used coupons. SEO-optimized for organic discovery.
kobonvip.result: The client can independently manage their entire catalogue and use click data to prioritize high-performing coupons.

watchly.description: Movie discovery app consuming the TMDB API — search, filtering, watchlists, and dynamic routing. Demonstrates clean API integration patterns.
watchly.problem: Needed a real project to sharpen API integration, pagination, and Next.js skills beyond tutorial exercises.
watchly.solution: Built a full movie, TV series, and anime discovery platform on the TMDB API — search, filtering, dynamic routing, and a personal watchlist with save/watched states.
watchly.result: A polished, production-quality learning project that demonstrates clean API patterns, state management, and user-first library UX.

experience.journeySubtitle: From self-teaching to production — a timeline of growth.

entries.2023: Started self-teaching HTML, CSS & JavaScript — built personal projects to cement the fundamentals.
entries.aug-sep-2024: Internship @ KreativeStorm — built an e-commerce store and a browser jumping game in a team using HTML, CSS & JS.
entries.late-2024: Completed the Meta Frontend Developer Professional Certificate on Coursera — covering React, Advanced React, UX/UI Design, JavaScript, and HTML/CSS.
entries.2025: Freelance frontend developer — delivered 5+ production-ready projects to clients including dashboards, API-integrated apps, and full-stack CMS/CRM features.
entries.oct-2025-now: UI/UX & Frontend Developer @ Nabdh-Alibtikar — designed and built the company website, implemented CMS & CRM with Supabase and Next.js, responsible for tech infrastructure and ongoing performance.
